caption: A man with brown hair, wearing a grey long-sleeved shirt, sits at a white desk facing a laptop. He is shown from a side-profile view, with his hands resting on the laptop keyboard and touchpad. The laptop screen displays a trading interface with a list of assets and a chart. On the desk next to the laptop sits a white mug. Large blue and orange text is overlaid across the center of the scene, reading "TO CONSISTENTLY ADD WINNING TRADES TO YOUR PORTFOLIO?". As the sequence progresses, the man remains in a stationary position, focused on his screen. The camera angle remains consistent, and there are no significant changes in the environment or the man's posture. The blue and orange text remains static on the screen throughout the sequence, while the content on the laptop screen subtly shifts as he interacts with the device.
